priority_exfil.reuses: Existing UH-60 model, flight path, landing/extraction animation.
priority_exfil.code_change: Shorter arrival delay and higher configurable price.

double_pass.reuses: Existing A-10 model, route, and strafe effect.
double_pass.code_change: Execute a second pass after the first, with higher configurable price.

focused_sweep.reuses: Existing UAV radar overlay, ping loop, and cosmetic loiter aircraft.
focused_sweep.code_change: Smaller radius, shorter duration, and faster refresh interval.
